---
title: "test_alfred_observer.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_alfred_observer.py"
loc: 13
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.82
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.97
---

## Intent
The `test_alfred_observer.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_alfred_overwatch_analyze_failure, test_alfred_overwatch_write_suggestion. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_alfred_overwatch_analyze_failure, test_alfred_overwatch_write_suggestion. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.engine.alfred_observer](file://src.core.engine.alfred_observer)

### Exports
- `test_alfred_overwatch_analyze_failure`
- `test_alfred_overwatch_write_suggestion`
